## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Changes

- What changed
- Why

## How to verify

- Commands to run locally: `./bin/punch run smoke`
- Files to check: reports/* and reports/state/test-context.json

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the punch CLI smoke tests locally
- [ ] I added/updated documentation in README.md or docs/
- [ ] I updated AGENTS.md if this change affects agent behavior
- [ ] Changes are small and focused (one feature / fix per PR)

## Notes for reviewers

Add any context or areas you want reviewers to focus on.
